texto: Jenny slowly awoke on the sacrificial altar to an Ethereal Light that flamed through the east wall, a radiant aura of love dispersing the frightful scene. A glow pulsating from Angeletta's body still burning in the fire pit slowly rose to join the Light. A Heavenly peace infused Jenny as she realized, "There's a man standing in the air straight above me!
explicacao: Citação de Judy Byington sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Jenny slowly awoke on the sacrificial altar to an Ethereal Light that flamed through the east wal…” articula motivacao, biography, inspiracional em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e inspiracional.

frase_original: Jenny slowly awoke on the sacrificial altar to an Ethereal Light that flamed through the east wall, a radiant aura of love dispersing the frightful scene. A glow pulsating from Angeletta's body still burning in the fire pit slowly rose to join the Light. A Heavenly peace infused Jenny as she realized, "There's a man standing in the air straight above me!

texto: Secret ceremonies in which malevolent men and women cloaked in hooded robes, hiding behind painted faces and chanting demonic incantations while inflicting sadistic wounds on innocent children lying on makeshift alters, or tied to inverted crosses, sounds like the stuff of which B-grade horror movies are made. Some think amoral religious cults only populate the world of Rosemary's Baby, but don't exist in real life. Or, do they? Ask Jenny Hill.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Judy Byington: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Secret ceremonies in which malevolent men and women cloaked in hooded robes, hiding behind painte…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, childhood-abuse, crime pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de crime e cult.
